Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF LANE COUNTY FLORENCE SELF-SUFFICIENCY AND VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION LOW INCOME HOME ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Energy assistance program for households with seniors that heat with electricity, natural gas, oil, propane, wood pellets or wood through a limited federal government funding program. The Low Income Home Energy Program (LIHEAP) makes a one-time payment directly to the utility account. 3180 Highway 101 Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Household with a member over 60 years old and 60% of median income level Hours: Call for hours (541) 682-7835 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SALVATION ARMY JACKSON COUNTY SALVATION ARMY SOCIAL SERVICES ASSISTANCE FOR OLDER ADULTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with rent, utilities, water, and prescriptions as funding is available. May also assist with transportation needs. 922 N Central Avenue Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Age 65 and older Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm (541) 773-6965 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SENIOR CENTERS LANE COUNTY WILLAMALANE ADULT ACTIVITY CENTER LIHEAP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides winter warming and summer cooling utility assistance, including electric, natural gas, and heating fuel. All assistance is through a waitlist. Assistance is not guaranteed. 215 W C Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: -Must be age 60 years or older -Most programs: 60% of Area Median Income Hours: -Waitlist enrollment is ongoing and open monthly starting Monday, January 5, 2026 until capacity is reached -Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 736-4406 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES SENIOR CONNECTIONS OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF LANE COUNTY LOW INCOME HOME ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM SALVATION ARMY JACKSON COUNTY ASSISTANCE FOR OLDER ADULTS SENIOR CENTERS LANE COUNTY LIHEAP
